caption: A group of martial artists perform a choreographed routine on a stage in front of an audience seated at tables. The performers, dressed in traditional Chinese martial arts uniforms in various colors—white, blue, and black—are executing synchronized movements with wooden staffs. They move rhythmically across the stage, stepping forward and back while raising their staffs above their heads and then bringing them down in controlled motions. The audience watches attentively as the performers demonstrate their skills and coordination in this disciplined display of martial arts. The setting is a well-lit banquet hall with chandeliers hanging from the ceiling, adding to the formal atmosphere of the event.
